portalNotes: No online permit portal. In-person submission only at City Hall, 650 Canyon Del Rey Blvd, Del Rey Oaks, CA 93940. Appointment required for plan check.

fireAgency.name: Seaside Bureau of Fire Prevention (City of Seaside)

healthDept.name: Monterey County Environmental Health Bureau
healthDept.notes: Health permit plan review for restaurants is handled by county, not city
